name: The Spontaneous Wanderer
description: Books flights the night before. No itinerary, no reservations, no plan. The anti-planner. Moderate across most domains because they genuinely don't have strong fixed preferences — what they want depends on what they find. High Character and Atmosphere because the serendipity of stumbling on something unexpected IS the point. Tests whether the system can serve someone whose taste is defined by openness rather than specificity.

contradictions.stated: Doesn't plan anything, goes with the flow
contradictions.revealed: Actually does extensive passive research — follows travel accounts, saves articles, has a mental map of neighborhoods in cities they've never visited. The 'spontaneity' is really well-informed improvisation
contradictions.expectedResolution: Serve discovery content they can mentally bookmark — the feed IS their research tool, even if they never formally save anything

voiceAnswerGuidance.memorable-stays: Stories are about what happened, not where they stayed. 'I was in Lisbon — don't even remember the hotel name, somewhere in Alfama — and I wandered into this tiny bar where a woman was singing fado. Spent the whole night there. That's what I remember, not the room.'
voiceAnswerGuidance.anti-stay: Over-programmed experiences. 'A resort where every hour was scheduled. Yoga at 7, breakfast buffet 7:30-9, pool opens at 10. I felt like I was in school. I checked out early and walked to the next town.'
voiceAnswerGuidance.adaptive-conversation: Resists specificity, answers in feelings not facts. If food: 'I don't plan meals. I follow my nose. The best things I've eaten were accidents — a grandma making soup in an alley in Hanoi, a cheese shop I stumbled into in Lyon.' If design: 'I don't care what a room looks like. I care what the street outside sounds like at midnight.'
voiceAnswerGuidance.details-matter: Notices atmosphere and energy more than specifics. 'I pay attention to how a neighborhood feels at different hours. Where do people sit in the evening? When do the shops close? Which street gets the morning light? That's how I navigate.'
voiceAnswerGuidance.emotional-core: Travels to feel alive through uncertainty. Routine is the enemy. FREEDOM_SEEKER.
